broadcast-warn.text:
BLACK SEA.
ROMANIA.
DNC 10.

BLACK SEA.

2. TO REPORT A MOBILE OFFSHORE DRILLING UNIT AS
   PER IMO RESOLUTION A.1023(26), PARAGRAPH 11.5.1,
   CONTACT NAVSAFETY@NGA.MIL SUBJ: MODU REPORT.
3. CANCEL NAVAREA IV 489/24.

WESTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
HAITI.
CHART 26141.
ILE DE LA TORTUE W. POINT LIGHT
20-03-44N 072-58-02W UNLIT.

WESTERN NORTH ATLANTIC.
MARYLAND.
1. DUE TO MARINE CASUALTY, THE PORT OF BALTIMORE
   39-16.00N 076-35.00W IS OPEN WITH RESTRICTIONS
   UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE.
2. CURRENT PORT INFORMATION CAN BE FOUND AT
   HOMEPORT.USCG.MIL USING THE PORT DIRECTORY TAB.
3. CANCEL NAVAREA IV 349/24.

MARITIME SAFETY WEBSITES.
1. NGA CONTINUES TO EXPERIENCE SOME TECHNICAL
   DIFFICULTIES AND USERS MAY STILL EXPERIENCE
   PROBLEMS ACCESSING CAC ENABLED/NIPRNET
   MARITIME SAFETY WEBSITES AND ESYNC.
   HOWEVER, MOST USERS SHOULD NOW BE ABLE
   TO ACCESS THESE SITES.
2. USERS THAT ARE STILL EXPERIENCING ISSUES CAN ACCESS
   DNC VDU PATCHES ON THE WWW AT HTTPS:DNC.NGA.MIL
   OR FULL UPDATED DNC LIBRARIES ON THE SIPRNET
   AT HTTP://DNC.NGA.SMIL.MIL.
3. USERS CAN ALSO ACCESS ESYNC OUTSIDE OF THE
   NGA NETWORK TO MAINTAIN DNC AND ENC AT
   HTTPS://EDGESYNC.DISTANCESUPPORT.NAVY.MIL/ESYNC.
4. FOR URGENT SERVICE CONTACT NGA NAVSAFETY,
   DSN: 547 5455, COMM: 800 362 6289 OR 571 557 5455,
   E-MAIL: NAVSAFETY@NGA.MIL, OR MSG TO
   NGA NAVSAFETY WASHINGTON DC.
5. CANCEL HYDROLANT 3039/22.

ALL SERVICES UNRELIABLE AT USCG REMOTE
COMMUNICATION FACILITIES:
A. BOSTON (F) 41-42.80N 070-30.30W.
B. CHARLESTON (E) 32-50.70N 079-57.00W.
C. CHESAPEAKE (N) 36-43.70N 076-00.60W.

VENEZUELA.

EASTERN CARIBBEAN SEA.
MARTINIQUE.

IN 14-51.78N 061-18.18W. VESSELS IN VICINITY
REQUESTED TO KEEP A SHARP LOOKOUT, ASSIST IF
POSSIBLE. REPORTS TO ANY COASTAL RADIO STATION.
